name: RAG System
description: Retrieval over OCR'd SGK Markdown using a local TF-IDF vector index (no external services).
limitations: Index/query is TF-IDF (stdlib-only, offline). OCR ingestion of PDFs runs separately and offline via scripts/ingest_pdfs.py (requires the 'rag-ocr' extras and a system Tesseract install) — it does not run through this capability or the /runs endpoint.
